questions.question: Which of the following dynasties did NOT significantly extend or rebuild the Great Wall of China?

answers.ans: Monty Python and the Holy Grail

questions.question: Which New York City skyscraper was the world's tallest building when it opened in 1931?
Which of the following early animated films is considered the first to feature synchronized sound?

answers.ans: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

answers.ans: It depicts the bombing of Guernica.

questions.question: Which Greek god is known for his role as the messenger of the gods and is often depicted with winged sandals?

Which of the following films is considered the first feature-length motion picture ever made?

answers.ans: The Story of the Kelly Gang
